name: spectra
description: Content capture and library for marketing — screenshots, videos, and usage sequences across web, macOS, iOS, watchOS, plus a tagged library for organizing and exporting assets for blog posts, social media, and documentation

interface.shortDescription: Capture and library plugin — screenshots, videos, and usage sequences across web and native, with tagged organization and export for blog/docs/marketing.
interface.longDescription: Spectra captures screenshots, videos, and step-by-step UI sessions from running apps on web, macOS, iOS, and watchOS, then organizes them in a tagged library you can search, group, and export to disk for blog posts, documentation, and marketing assets. Includes a one-command migration from the legacy showcase plugin.
